penalties.description: Video appears to be instructional content rather than a formal FLS task performance. No clear timing boundaries or completion state can be determined.

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on whether this is a scoreable FLS task performance. Claude identified this as instructional content without clear timing boundaries, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed task. Given the fundamental uncertainty about task structure and the absence of clear start/end markers typical of formal FLS assessments, the conservative approach is to treat this as incomplete/non-scoreable.
